title: Lean kernel proof — UDSSensorReceiptChain.total_order
thesis: The receipt chain is total-ordered; every entry's hash includes the prior hash, so cutting or reordering is observable.
script: Display the theorem statement Lutar.UDSSensorReceiptChain.total_order and its axiom dependency list via lake build + --print-axioms.
cli: lake build && lake env lean --print-axioms Lutar/UDSSensorReceiptChain.lean
expected_output: Theorem statement + minimal axiom list printed.
fallback: Load committed .olean artifact and run --print-axioms only; or show .lean source beside SBOMProvenance.lean.
